summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the Live Preview Panel feature on Site Map & Link Manager admin page. All 18 test cases passed. The feature allows admins to preview any page from the sitemap in a toggleable side panel with device size toggles (Desktop/Tablet/Mobile).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Preview Panel feature fully tested and working. Key test IDs verified: toggle-preview, preview-iframe, device-desktop, device-tablet, device-mobile, refresh-preview, close-preview, preview-page-name, live-preview-panel. All existing features (List View, Board View, Collection Organizer) continue to work correctly.

live_preview_panel: ✓ Live Preview toggle button appears in header and toggles panel on/off
✓ Clicking page row in List View updates preview iframe to that page's URL
✓ Clicking page card in Board View updates preview iframe
✓ Device toggle buttons (Desktop/Tablet/Mobile) change iframe container width
✓ Selected/previewed page has indigo left border highlight in List View
✓ Selected page card has indigo highlight in Board View
✓ Preview header shows page name and URL path
✓ URL bar in preview panel shows full URL
✓ Refresh button on preview reloads iframe
✓ Open in new tab button works (href verified)
✓ Eye icon on each page row in list view works
✓ Preview persists after Refresh sitemap button is clicked
✓ Toggle button text changes between 'Live Preview' and 'Hide Preview'
existing_features_verified: ✓ List View works correctly with preview panel
✓ Board View works correctly with preview panel
✓ Unlink buttons visible in Board View destination columns (9 found)
